metadata.title: EffectLab — Visual Effect Showcase for Developers
metadata.description: Browse, preview, and copy stunning visual effects for your React projects.

hero.title: React visual effects
hero.description: Browse 100+ curated effects from real npm libraries. Preview live, compare bundle sizes, and copy code.

howToUse.optionADesc: Describe what you need. The plugin automatically finds the right library.
howToUse.optionAExample1: add a 3D tilt hover effect to my cards
howToUse.optionAExample2: I need a typewriter animation for the hero
howToUse.optionBDesc: Find an effect below. Hit "Copy for AI" and paste into Claude Code.

card.copiedEffectDesc: Paste into Claude Code or your AI assistant

tagDescriptions.spring: Natural physics-based animation that bounces like a spring. Gives lively movement instead of rigid CSS transitions.
tagDescriptions.bounce: Bouncing effect at the destination. Gives a playful, energetic feel.
tagDescriptions.elastic: Rubber-band-like animation that stretches and snaps back. Features overshoot and oscillation.
tagDescriptions.easing: Acceleration and deceleration curves for natural timing. The foundation of all animation.
tagDescriptions.inertia: Physics-based deceleration effect. Provides natural slowdown after scroll or drag.
tagDescriptions.physics: Animation based on physical laws like gravity, collision, and friction. Simulates realistic movement.
tagDescriptions.fade: Transition through opacity changes. The most basic and smooth transition effect.
tagDescriptions.slide: Element glides in one direction. Commonly used for page transitions and menus.
tagDescriptions.scale: Size transformation that grows or shrinks elements. Used for emphasis or enter/exit animations.
tagDescriptions.rotate: Element spins around an axis. Used for spinners, icon transitions, and loading states.
tagDescriptions.flip: 3D card-flip effect rotating 180 degrees. Used for front/back transitions or revealing information.
tagDescriptions.morph: One shape smoothly transforms into another. Used for icon, shape, and number transitions.
tagDescriptions.reveal: Hidden content gradually becomes visible. Various methods including clip-path, mask, and scroll.
tagDescriptions.collapse: Element folds by reducing height/width. Used for accordions and dropdowns.
tagDescriptions.parallax: Layers move at different speeds to create depth. Various methods including scroll, mouse, and more.
tagDescriptions.scroll-linked: Animation progress tied to scroll position. Controls like scrubbing forward and backward.
tagDescriptions.scroll-triggered: Animation fires once when entering the viewport. Commonly used for landing page content reveals.
tagDescriptions.smooth-scroll: Smooth inertial scrolling effect. Provides a premium feel over default browser scroll.
tagDescriptions.sticky: Element stays fixed on screen while scrolling. Used for navigation and sidebars.
tagDescriptions.hover: Visual response when mouse enters an element. Provides interactive feedback on buttons, cards, and images.
tagDescriptions.ripple: Circular wave expanding from click point. Material Design's signature interaction.
tagDescriptions.pulse: Periodic brightness or size change. Used for loading states and drawing attention.
tagDescriptions.shake: Rapid horizontal oscillation. Used to express errors or rejection.
tagDescriptions.drag: Grab and move elements. Used for card sorting, sliders, and more.
tagDescriptions.gesture: Interactions responding to drag, swipe, and pinch gestures. Creates mobile app-like touch experiences.
tagDescriptions.typewriter: Text appears character by character as if being typed. Commonly used in hero sections and chat UIs.
tagDescriptions.scramble: Characters randomize before settling on final text. Creates a hacker/cyber aesthetic.
tagDescriptions.counter: Numbers roll up or down to a target value. Used for statistics, dashboards, and pricing.
tagDescriptions.marquee: Content flows continuously in one direction. Used for announcements and brand strips.
tagDescriptions.kinetic-type: Expressive typography animation where text moves and transforms to convey emotion.
tagDescriptions.particles: Small elements floating or scattering on screen. Used for background decoration and interaction feedback.
tagDescriptions.confetti: Colorful paper bursts or flying emojis for celebrations. Used for checkout success and achievements.
tagDescriptions.noise: Organic random patterns using Perlin/Simplex noise. The basis for natural-looking movement.
tagDescriptions.flow-field: Generative art technique where particles follow vector fields.
tagDescriptions.generative: Visual patterns created by algorithms. Procedural art that produces different results each time.
tagDescriptions.glow: Soft light emanating from elements. Used as attention-grabbing highlights on buttons, cards, and borders.
tagDescriptions.gradient: Smoothly flowing or moving color gradients. Creates atmosphere as backgrounds or mesh shapes.
tagDescriptions.blur: Blur effects for depth or transitions. Used for glassmorphism and focus effects.
tagDescriptions.neon: Vivid glowing effect like neon signs. Creates strong visual impact on dark themes.
tagDescriptions.aurora: Flowing color bands like northern lights. Creates a dreamy, premium atmosphere for backgrounds.
tagDescriptions.beam: Light streak sweeping across a surface. Adds premium highlights to cards and buttons.
tagDescriptions.glassmorphism: Semi-transparent glass-like blur and tint effect. A modern, clean UI style.
tagDescriptions.shadow: Depth and hierarchy through shadow effects.
tagDescriptions.layout: Smooth element repositioning when layout changes. Used for FLIP, reorder, and more.
tagDescriptions.stagger: Multiple elements animate sequentially with delays. Used for list and grid entrance animations.
tagDescriptions.timeline: Combining multiple animations in time sequence. Used in GSAP, Anime.js, and more.
tagDescriptions.lottie: Animation format from After Effects/Rive for web playback. Even complex motion stays lightweight.
tagDescriptions.svg-draw: Lines drawing along SVG paths. Used for logo animations and illustration reveals.
tagDescriptions.3d: Depth and rotation for a three-dimensional feel. Used for card flips, tilting, and 3D scenes.
tagDescriptions.shader: Advanced visual effects using GPU shaders. Used for gradients, distortion, and post-processing.
tagDescriptions.other: Various visual effects that don't fit the above categories.
